case_title: DOMINGA AQUINO VS. SAMUEL ALLEN WILHELM ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16283043)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-27-2016 CONTINUED TO SEP-07-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-25-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
